notes: Refined the entire UI around a Steam-inspired indie RPG terminal language with restrained straight-line panels, quieter contrast, and typography-first hierarchy.
Reworked the shell, drawers, modal windows, lists, and command bars so the game reads more like an always-running narrative terminal than a traditional browser homepage or loud page game.
Retuned inventory, skill, map, and status windows toward a cleaner two-pane layout with calmer metallic surfaces, better item emphasis, and less cluttered interaction states.
Adjusted the wording and scene framing across menu, create-role, event, battle, and world scenes to support a more mature, minimal, text-forward presentation.
